Geometry_Package documentation¶

class Geometry.line(points, name='')¶

Represents a line consisting of multiple points.

get_points()¶

Returns the list of points in the line.

Returns:

List of point objects

Return type:

list

class Geometry.point(x, y, name='')¶

Represents a point in 2D space with optional name.

get_boylam()¶

Returns the longitude (boylam) of the point.

Returns:

Longitude value

Return type:

float

get_enlem()¶

Returns the latitude (enlem) of the point.

Returns:

Latitude value

Return type:

float

Geometry.read_lines(filename)¶

Reads lines from a text file.

Parameters:

filename (str) – Path to the input file

Returns:

List of line objects

Return type:

list

Geometry.read_points(filename)¶

Reads points from a text file.

Parameters:

filename (str) – Path to the input file

Returns:

List of point objects

Return type:

list

Geometry_Package
